text: I hate when someone says I can't cook. I never even went to culinary school, but I've worked in some of the best restaurants in America. How'd that happen? And not to sound like a broken record or the guy from Ratatouille, but anyone can cook. So I'm going to distill down some of the core essentials to what I know about cooking. And by the end of this video, mark my words, you will be able to cook so long as you follow the guidelines I'm about to give you. Starting off with the basics of measuring. This is incredibly important because it's the first place most people go wrong. How do you measure ingredients to be correct?
